title: PEDIATRIC CARE - 211info
text: GLADSTONE HEALTH CENTER PEDIATRIC CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary medical care for children and youth such as general physicals, vaccinations, treatment of acute and chronic illness, health education, treatment of ADD/ADHD, anxiety and mild to moderate depression. Also assists in applying for the Oregon Health Plan and private insurances on the Federal Health Exchange. 18911 Portland Avenue Gladstone, OR 97027 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 Hours: Monday/Thursday 9am-6pm, Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm (503) 655-8471 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 655-8471 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment. Same day appointments available. FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured and underinsured patients. Minimum $20 fee due at time of medical appointment for uninsured patients. No one is refused care due to an inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday 8am-6pm, Wednesday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization General Medical Care HPV Immunizations Pediatrics Vaccine Information Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GLADSTONE HEALTH CENTER
